chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5136 of 2024 Qasim Saeed Qureshi Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.22698/24 2. For orders on office objection No.29. 3. For orders on Misc. No.22699/24 4. For orders on Misc. No.22700/24 5. For hearing of main case. Dated: 15.10.2024 Mr. Ahmed Ali Gabool for petitioner. -.-.- It is claimed that this petition is filed by one Qasim Saeed Qureshi as a pro-bono. He has submitted that an FIR was lodged, prima facie, against some individuals of respondent No.6 and the matter is being investigated. He submits that since incriminating material was recovered therefore respondent No.6 should be blacklisted from awarding any contract. We have heard learned and perused the material available on record. Under no stretch of imagination this public interest litigation could be a grievance against respondent No.6 if an FIR is lodged and is being investigated as the challan will be submitted in accordance with law and the matter will be taken to its logical end. No question is raised enabling us to intervene in respect of the controversy purportedly raised in this petition as to the incriminating material allegedly recovered by the Investigating Officer. Thus, petition being misconceived is dismissed along with listed applications with a cost of Rs.25,000/-, (Rupees Twenty Five Thousand) to be deposited in the High Court Clinic in a fortnight. Chief Justice Judge
